title: Crassocephalum manampanihense
taxonomy: Crassocephalum manampanihense is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Crassocephalum, which is a group of plants commonly known as broad-leaved or large-leaved African daisies. The species is native to Madagascar and is part of the larger group of plants known as flowering plants or angiosperms. Crassocephalum manampanihense is classified as a member of the kingdom Plantae, the phylum Magnoliophyta, and the class Magnoliopsida. Further classification includes the order Asterales, the family Asteraceae, and the genus Crassocephalum.
